overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing an NCPD police officer walking through a sunlit futuristic urban environment. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses streets, ascends a sloped path, and walks past construction barriers while pedestrians and vehicles populate the scene.

events.description: ego crosses the street at the marked crosswalk, passing pedestrians standing on the corner

agents.ego_description: walking across the crosswalk and continuing along the sidewalk in a steady pace

notable_agents.action: orange taxi parked at the curb

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing with white stripes
distinctive orange and yellow taxi parked on the street
low-rise commercial building with green facade
well-maintained green hedge row along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the NCPD officer walking toward a crosswalk in a sunny urban area. The officer crosses the street, passing an orange taxi parked on the right and green commercial buildings on the left. Pedestrians stand on the corners as the camera moves steadily forward across the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: uphill sidewalk with concrete retaining wall

events.description: begins ascending a sloped sidewalk alongside a high concrete wall

agents.ego_description: walking uphill on a sloped sidewalk with a concrete wall on the left side

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with graffiti running alongside the sidewalk
futuristic high-rise buildings visible in the distance uphill

segments.scene_description: The officer walks up a steeply inclined sidewalk bordered by a tall concrete retaining wall on the left. The path ascends away from the previous intersection, with distant futuristic skyscrapers visible ahead. The environment is more enclosed with the wall creating a corridor-like feel.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with palm trees and commercial buildings

events.description: reaches top of slope and turns right at the street corner
stops briefly at the corner to observe the surroundings before continuing

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner, then pausing briefly to look around the intersection

entered.detail: red-painted curb marking the corner intersection
tall palm trees lining the street in the background
building with vibrant colorful signage and murals

segments.scene_description: The officer reaches the top of the incline and turns right at a street corner. After a brief pause to observe the intersection, the character surveys the area where palm trees and colorful commercial buildings are visible. The concrete wall from the previous section falls away as the scene opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with construction barriers and industrial elements

events.description: begins walking along sidewalk lined with metal construction fencing
military armored vehicle visible at the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the construction-lined sidewalk toward the Florence intersection

notable_agents.action: man in plaid shirt walking across the sidewalk

entered.detail: temporary metal barrier fencing with orange supports lining the construction site
red street sign reading 'Florence' marking the intersection
large black military truck parked or moving at the intersection
line of parked vehicles along the opposite side of the street

segments.scene_description: The officer walks along a sidewalk bordered by metal construction fencing on the right. The character passes a pedestrian in a plaid shirt and approaches the Florence street intersection, where a large military armored vehicle is visible. The environment shifts to a more industrial feel with construction barriers and parked cars lining the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit futuristic city that transitions from an open intersection into a narrow incline and finally toward an industrial construction zone. It begins with an NCPD officer crossing a bright urban street, passing an orange taxi and green commercial buildings as pedestrians gather on the corners. As the officer moves forward, the scene shifts into a corridor-like environment, ascending a steeply inclined sidewalk bordered by a tall concrete retaining wall with skyscrapers looming in the distance. The view then opens up as the officer reaches the top of the slope and turns right, leaving the wall behind to reveal palm trees and colorful storefronts. Finally, the camera follows the officer along a sidewalk lined with metal construction fencing and parked cars, passing a pedestrian before arriving at an intersection dominated by a large military armored vehicle.
